task_completion.description: The dashboard is named exactly 'NOC Triage Board'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'NOC Triage Board' at the top of the Graphite dashboard interface.

task_completion.description: A graph titled 'Hottest Servers' is created
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a graph panel with the exact title 'Hottest Servers'.

task_completion.description: The 'Hottest Servers' graph uses the highestCurrent function for 2 CPU metrics
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the graph's legend or query editor for the function 'highestCurrent' applied to 'servers.*.cpu.*' with a parameter of 2. The graph should display exactly 2 metric lines.

task_completion.description: A graph titled 'Temperature Alert Zone' is created with a threshold line
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a graph panel titled 'Temperature Alert Zone'. It must show a plotted metric line and a flat, horizontal threshold line at the value 80.

task_completion.description: The 'Temperature Alert Zone' graph uses the correct temperature metric and threshold function
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the legend or query editor for 'servers.datacenter.machine_temperature' and a 'threshold' function set to 80, labeled 'Critical Threshold'.

task_completion.description: A graph titled 'Sorted Disk Activity' is created
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a graph panel with the exact title 'Sorted Disk Activity' displaying disk write metrics.

task_completion.description: The 'Sorted Disk Activity' graph uses sortByMaxima and aliasByNode
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the legend or query editor for 'sortByMaxima' and 'aliasByNode' with an index of 1. The legend should show short instance names (e.g., 'ec2_instance_X') rather than the full metric path.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Graphite web interface to build the dashboard
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Graphite web UI (Composer or Dashboard view) being actively used, rather than just a terminal or text editor.

integrity.description: The graphs display actual plotted data lines
integrity.visual_evidence: The graphs should show real, fluctuating data lines (time-series data) rather than being completely empty or showing mock/drawn lines.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the expected answers into a text file
integrity.visual_evidence: The required names, titles, and functions must appear within the actual Graphite application UI, not just written out in a text editor like nano or gedit.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Dashboard Name: 'NOC Triage Board'. Expected Graph Titles: 'Hottest Servers', 'Temperature Alert Zone', 'Sorted Disk Activity'. The 'Hottest Servers' graph must use highestCurrent(..., 2). The 'Temperature Alert Zone' graph must use a threshold of 80 labeled 'Critical Threshold'. The 'Sorted Disk Activity' graph must use sortByMaxima and aliasByNode with index 1.
